aligned_lyrics.text: Fog on the glass where my name goes
Street signs smear into a line
You said “text me when you’re fine”
(yeah) I’m half awake in the backseat
Your favorite song feels weird this year
Lipstick stain on a paper cup
We kept trying not to bring it up
(oh) I’m half awake in the backseat
“집에 다 왔어요” but it’s not home
Mumbled your name to the streetlight
말은 못 하고 I meant it
